response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable and versatile senior software engineer with 20 years of broad hands-on experience, but he is a poor fit for this Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role. The position demands a director-level IC with deep, long-standing AI/ML expertise, a track record of building AI-powered products or platforms at scale, cloud platform fluency, and the gravitas to advise strategic enterprise customers — none of which are well-evidenced in this resume. His AI exposure is limited to recent MCP tooling work started in April 2025, and his career arc is that of a craftsman-builder rather than a technical strategist or thought leader. The educational background meets only the minimum bar, with no advanced AI-related degree.
strengths: 20+ years of broad engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure across multiple languages and stacks
Entrepreneurial experience as founder of GISCollective, demonstrating initiative and ability to build and sustain a platform independently
Recent hands-on work with MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators and agentic AI frameworks at re:cinq, showing current AI awareness
concerns: AI/ML expertise is shallow and very recent (2025 only); no history of building AI-powered products or platforms at meaningful scale
Career profile is that of a senior individual contributor builder, not a director-level technical strategist capable of advising enterprise customers on AI adoption
No demonstrated cloud platform depth or experience in the kind of large-scale cloud infrastructure strategy this role centers on

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and track record
